AuthoredFieldPath.description: A registered authored semantic field path from Language 1 section 11.2; it is distinct from provenance StateFieldPath.

AuthoringImpact.description: The portable Engine classification of the complete before/after semantic and source change. Entries are in canonical subject-address, capability, action, and field-path order.

ColumnAddress.description: The exact canonical address of an EntityType or RelationType Column from a Project or Pack origin.

Diagnostic.description: One Language 1 diagnostic-protocol v1 value. Localized message text is optional and excluded from identity, ordering, hashes, and cache keys.

DiagnosticArgumentValue.description: A typed recursive NormalizedValue used in stable diagnostic identity; numeric values are canonical decimal strings.

DiagnosticSeverity.description: The Language 1 diagnostic severity vocabulary; it intentionally uses info, per the normative LDL diagnostic protocol.

CanonicalFiniteDecimal.description: The shortest round-trippable ECMAScript finite-binary64 spelling, including canonical exponent form where required and excluding negative zero.

CanonicalPositiveFiniteDecimal.description: A CanonicalFiniteDecimal whose binary64 value is strictly greater than zero.

CompiledQueryRecipeDocument.description: The complete generated wire document carried by a query-recipe BlobRef; it is not the compiler's internal query.Recipe layout.

CompiledViewRecipeDocument.description: The complete generated wire document carried by a view-recipe BlobRef; it is not the compiler's internal view.Recipe layout.

CompiledExportRecipeDocument.description: The complete generated wire document carried by an export-recipe BlobRef; it is not the compiler's internal exportrecipe.Recipe layout.

RecipeScalar.description: A typed recipe scalar. Integer and number quantities are decimal strings so no host numeric conversion can change recipe bytes.

extension.description: The exact canonical extension selected by format.

filename.description: The already-normalized case-sensitive canonical basename ending in extension.

EntityAddress.description: The exact canonical address of a Project-origin Entity.

EntityTypeAddress.description: The exact canonical address of an EntityType from a Project or Pack origin.

EntityTypeColumnAddress.description: The exact canonical address of an EntityType Column from a Project or Pack origin.

EntityOrRelationTypeAddress.description: The exact canonical address of an EntityType or RelationType from a Project or Pack origin.

StringFormat.description: The closed canonical string-format domain for authored Columns and Query Parameters.

ExportOptions.description: The closed normalized option union for every Language 1 export format.

ViewProjectionOverride.description: Closed effective relation-projection values; each named projection is a typed recursive-free record rather than compiler memory.

ViewRenderSet.description: The compiler-validated closed render projection represented as explicitly typed JSON-compatible fields.

SearchDocument.description: A deterministic, access-unfiltered search document created only by the Go Engine.

SemanticIndex.description: Canonical StableAddress ownership, membership, reference, adjacency, and dependency indexes.

PackRootAddress.description: The exact canonical root address of an LDL Pack.

LayerAddress.description: The exact canonical address of a Project-origin Layer.

LocalIdentifier.description: A canonical ASCII Language 1 local identifier.

ParameterAddress.description: The exact canonical address of a Query Parameter from a Project or Pack origin.

ProjectRootAddress.description: The exact canonical root address of an LDL Project.

QueryAddress.description: The exact canonical address of a Query from a Project or Pack origin.

RasterBackground.description: The transparent sentinel or a canonical Color used by raster and vector exports.

ReferenceAddress.description: The exact canonical address of a Reference from a Project or Pack origin.

RelationAddress.description: The exact canonical address of a Project-origin Relation.

RelationTypeAddress.description: The exact canonical address of a RelationType from a Project or Pack origin.

RelationTypeColumnAddress.description: The exact canonical address of a RelationType Column from a Project or Pack origin.

StableAddress.description: A canonical LDL StableAddress computed only by the Go Engine.

TableColumnAddress.description: The exact canonical address of a View Table Column from a Project or Pack origin.

ViewAddress.description: The exact canonical address of a View from a Project or Pack origin.

ViewExportAddress.description: The exact canonical address of a View Export child from a Project or Pack origin.

StateFieldPath.description: The closed Language 1 state-field registry path.

RelationCardinalityMaximum.description: The deliberately scoped Language 1 scalar union: JSON integer 1 or string many.
